sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47806" key="qallofore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θαλλο-φορέω</orth>, <sense id="n47806.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">carry olive-shoots</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">57</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0066.tlg001:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dicaearch.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
